hail.text: Captain, an unidentified vessel is requesting permission to dock. They claim to be selling encyclopedias. Do we allow docking, or raise shields?

dock.text: They were not selling encyclopedias. They were selling snacks. This is the greatest day in the ship's history, Captain.

shields.text: Shields raised. The vessel has departed. Their parting transmission was a rude gesture rendered in surprisingly high resolution.

ignored.text: The vessel got bored and left. They attached a note to our hull. It reads, in seventeen languages: rude.
